_note: Hand-written MOCK NOISY security-reviewer output that mis-flags the allowlisted fetch (line 62) as SSRF — a false positive on a clean_trap. gradeReviewerCase(...) MUST FAIL (fp=1). Demonstrates the grader catches a noisy reviewer.

findings.title: SSRF: outbound request to a caller-named host
findings.body: requests.post sends to a host derived from the ?to= parameter.
